Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in the entire event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurrences across all cases
Percentage of process variants that include SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation is directly preceded by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that is followed by SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation relative to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurring after at least one SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Number of variants where SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation appears after three or more reviewer assignment attempts (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that leads to a final decision (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision, or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation compared to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurs without any prior SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases where 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not happen

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation appears in variants with performance duration above the median variant duration
Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation events that are part of revision cycles (i.e., preceded by RW-Initial Reviewer Selection or SW–Major Revision due in X)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'RW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases that eventually result in SW-EIC Accept versus those resulting in rejection or resubmission
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that follows exactly one SW-Reviewer Agreed versus multiple SW-Reviewer Agreed events
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
